keywords.job: Job? JOB? Hey man - I am in prison! But you know - once upon a time - I was a powerful mage! A mage ... come to think of it .., what is that - a mage?
keywords.name: My name is - uhm - hang on? I knew it yesterday, didn't I? Doesn't matter!
keywords.time: Better save time than comitting a crime. I am a poet and I know it!
keywords.sorcerer: I am the mightiest sorcerer from here to there! Yeah!
keywords.power: Power. Hmmm. Once while we were crossing the mountains together a man named Aureus said to me that parcels are equal to power. Any idea what that meant?
keywords.books: I have many books in my home. But only powerful people can read them. I bet you will only see three dots after the headline! Hehehe! Hahaha! Excellent!
keywords.mad: Hey! That's me! You got it! Thanks mate - now I remember my name!
keywords.mage: Hey! That's me! You got it! Thanks mate - now I remember my name!
keywords.riddle: Great riddle, isn't it? If you can tell me the correct answer, I will give you something. Hehehe!
keywords.something: No! I won't tell you. Shame coz it would be useful for you - hehehe.
keywords.escape: How could I escape? They only give me rotten food here. I can't regain my powers because I have no mana!
keywords.key: Sure I have the key! Hehehe! Perhaps I will give it to you. IF you can solve my riddle.
keywords.mino: They are trying to capture me! Or hang on! Haven't they already captured me? Hmmm - I will have to think about this.
keywords.markwin: He is the worst of them all! He is the king of the minos! May he burn in hell!
keywords.labyrinth: It's easy to find your way through it! Just follow the pools of mud. Hehe - useful hint, isn't it?
keywords.way: It's easy to find your way through it! Just follow the pools of mud. Hehe - useful hint, isn't it?
keywords.palkar: He is the leader of the outcasts. I hope he will never conquer the city of Mintwallin. That would be the end of me!
keywords.demon: The only monster I cannot conjure. But soon I will be powerful enough!
keywords.monster: Yeah! There are many monsters guarding my home. Only the bravest hero will be able to slay them!
keywords.conjure: Yeah! There are many monsters guarding my home. Only the bravest hero will be able to slay them!
keywords.home: Yeah! There are many monsters guarding my home. Only the bravest hero will be able to slay them!
keywords.number: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.
keywords.math: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.
keywords.1+1$: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.
keywords.1$: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.
keywords.+$: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.
keywords.plus: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.
keywords.one: You already know the secrets of mathemagics! Now go and use them to learn.

texts: Huh? What? I can see! Wow! A non-mino. Did they capture you as well?
Job? JOB? Hey man - I am in prison! But you know - once upon a time - I was a powerful mage! A mage ... come to think of it .., what is that - a mage?

greetingPatterns.response: Huh? What? I can see! Wow! A non-mino. Did they capture you as well?

entries.response: Mnjam. Excellent! Thanks, man!
Do you want to trick me? You don't have one lousy apple!
Ooooooooooo.<sniff>
Ok. Take my money. I can summon new money anytime - hehehe.
You do not have one.
Hmmmmm.
Mnjam - excellent apples. Now - about that key. You are sure want it?
Get some more apples first!
Then go away!
Really, really?
Then go away!
Really, really, really, really?
Then go away!
Then take it and get happy - or die, hehe.
Then go away!
But first tell me your favourite colour please!
Very interesting. So are you ready to proceed in you lesson in mathemagics?
I think you are not in touch with yourself, come back if you have tuned in on your own feelings.
So know that everthing is based on the simple fact that 1 + 1 = 49!
So know that everthing is based on the simple fact that 1 + 1 = 94!
So know that everthing is based on the simple fact that 1 + 1 = 13!
So know that everthing is based on the simple fact that 1 + 1 = 1!
